playlist_strategy: A dynamic morning workout progression starting with building motivation, peaking mid-workout with high intensity anthems, and finishing with triumphant cool-down tracks to cement a sense of accomplishment.

tracks.title: Dawn Protocol
tracks.youtube_title: Dawn Protocol ⚡ Ultimate Rise and Grind Morning Prep
tracks.listening_scenario: Pre-workout stretching or mental prep in the early morning
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic ambient electronic, 110 bpm, A minor, slow building tension, deep sub bass, ethereal synth pads, crisp minimal percussion, early morning atmosphere, atmospheric synth swell hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A lone athlete stretching in a dimly lit gym, dramatic sunrise light piercing through a large window, deep blue shadows and soft orange sunlight, cinematic 8k, hyper-detailed, motivational atmosphere.
tracks.youtube_description: Start your morning right with 'Dawn Protocol'. This cinematic electronic track is designed to help you focus and warm up before your morning grind. Let the atmospheric synths guide your preparation and prime your muscles for the work ahead.

tracks.title: First Light Activation
tracks.youtube_title: First Light Activation 🔥 Rise and Grind Training Motivation
tracks.listening_scenario: Initial cardio warm-up or light lifting
tracks.target_audience: Gym goers starting their daily routine
tracks.style_prompt: Energetic bass house, 126 bpm, G minor, driving four-on-the-floor beat, punchy sub bassline, rhythmic vocal chops, dynamic build-up, heavy bass hook within first 5 seconds, pristine modern club production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Close-up of gym shoes stepping firmly onto a treadmill glowing with futuristic blue and orange neon lights, high contrast, dynamic angle, photorealistic, fitness energy.
tracks.youtube_description: Get your blood pumping with 'First Light Activation'. This driving Bass House track brings exactly the energy you need to step up the pace on your warm-up and transition into the heavy lifting of your morning grind.

tracks.title: Iron Awakening
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Awakening 🚀 Aggressive Morning Pump Music
tracks.listening_scenario: Hitting the first heavy working sets
tracks.style_prompt: Modern hard rock instrumental, 135 bpm, Drop D tuning, aggressive distorted guitar riffs, pounding heavy drum kit, driving bass guitar, intense energy build, explosive guitar hook within first 5 seconds, stadium-ready modern rock production.
tracks.image_prompt: A chalk-covered hand tightly gripping a knurled barbell, dramatic under-lighting, crimson red accents, metallic gunmetal tones, raw gritty texture, high intensity gym motivation photography.
tracks.youtube_description: Time to pick up the heavy iron. 'Iron Awakening' delivers aggressive modern hard rock riffs designed to push you through your first heavy working sets of the day. Embrace the grind and crush your morning goals.

tracks.title: Relentless Pursuit
tracks.listening_scenario: Sustained high-effort tempo reps or intense machines
tracks.style_prompt: Midtempo bass music, 105 bpm, E minor, heavy industrial synth crunch, metallic percussion, deep heavy kick drum, glitchy sound design, aggressive and relentless groove, industrial hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern electronic production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A muscular athlete looking directly at the camera with intense focus through a row of gym equipment, neon green lighting reflecting off sweat, deep harsh shadows, cinematic cyberpunk fitness aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the tension high with 'Relentless Pursuit'. This midtempo bass track features heavy, industrial electronic sounds perfect for maintaining an unyielding pace during your high-rep hypertrophy sets. Never stop the grind.

tracks.title: Apex Predator
tracks.youtube_title: Apex Predator 🦍 MAX OUT Heavy Lifting Anthem
tracks.listening_scenario: Going for a one-rep max or extreme exertion
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive drift phonk mixed with trap metal, 140 bpm, C# minor, distorted 808 bass, rapid trap hi-hats, signature aggressive cowbell melody, frantic siren synths, explosive beat drop, distorted cowbell hook within first 5 seconds, extremely loud modern production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: An extreme low-angle shot of a massive lifter mid-squat with heavy plates bending the bar, blood-red rim lighting, pitch black background, gritty film grain, pure adrenaline and aggression.
tracks.youtube_description: This is it. The peak. 'Apex Predator' is pure, unfiltered aggression in the form of Trap Metal and Phonk. When you need to smash a personal record and dominate the iron, let this max-out anthem fuel your raw power.

tracks.title: Heartbreaker HIIT
tracks.youtube_title: Heartbreaker HIIT 🚀 Extreme Cardio Sprint Track
tracks.listening_scenario: All-out cardio sprint or intense HIIT interval
tracks.style_prompt: High energy drum and bass, 174 bpm, F minor, rapid chopped breakbeats, deep rolling Reese bass, uplifting synth chords, intense risers and drops, massive breakbeat fill hook within first 5 seconds, polished modern UK bass production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Motion blur shot of an athlete sprinting intensely on a curved treadmill, vibrant electric purple and cyan light streaks demonstrating speed, hyper-dynamic composition, high energy sports photography.
tracks.youtube_description: Push your cardiovascular limits with 'Heartbreaker HIIT'. This blazing fast 174 BPM Drum and Bass track is specifically engineered for your most gruelling all-out sprints and high-intensity interval bursts. Leave it all on the floor.

tracks.title: Unbreakable Will
tracks.youtube_title: Unbreakable Will 🛡️ Epic Orchestral Workout Motivation
tracks.listening_scenario: Pushing through the hardest final reps of a major muscle group
tracks.style_prompt: Epic orchestral rock hybrid, 120 bpm, D minor, massive brass fanfare, thunderous taiko drum percussion, heavy distorted chugging guitars, epic sweeping choir, heroic and triumphant mood, massive brass hook within first 5 seconds, cinematic blockbuster production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A heroic silhouette of a bodybuilder posing against a backdrop of golden morning sunlight breaking through dark storm clouds, marble textures, cinematic lighting, epic mythological aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: Summon your inner hero with 'Unbreakable Will'. Blending massive orchestral horns with heavy rock guitars, this epic track is forged for those final, painful reps where your mind wants to quit but your body refuses. Complete the set.

tracks.title: Steadfast Rythm
tracks.youtube_title: Steadfast Rhythm 🌊 Deep House Focus Grind
tracks.listening_scenario: Cooling down with steady-state cardio or accessory work
tracks.target_audience: Athletes finishing up their secondary exercises
tracks.style_prompt: Atmospheric deep house, 122 bpm, A# minor, grooving deep bass pluck, smooth four-on-the-floor rhythm, airy soft synth keys, rhythmic shakers, hypnotic steady flow, bouncy bass hook within first 5 seconds, clean and polished club production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: An athlete focused on a cable machine exercise, cool teal lighting, grey urban gym interior, smooth clear focus, aesthetic minimal fitness photography, calm but determined state.
tracks.youtube_description: Settle into a hypnotic groove with 'Steadfast Rhythm'. As the workout peaks pass, this Deep House track helps you lock into steady focus for your accessory work and core routines. Flow perfectly to the finish line.

tracks.title: The Aftermath
tracks.youtube_title: The Aftermath 🌅 Triumphant Cool Down & Stretch
tracks.target_audience: Anyone successfully finishing an intense morning session
tracks.style_prompt: Melodic chillstep, 140 bpm (half-time feel at 70 bpm), F major, sweeping ethereal vocal pads, heavy but slow half-time drum beat, gliding warm sub bass, emotional grand piano melodies, beautiful sweeping vocal hook within first 5 seconds, lush cinematic production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: A tired but smiling athlete sitting on a gym bench wiping sweat with a towel, warm golden hour morning light streaming in, soft purple ambient shadows, feeling of accomplishment and peace.
tracks.youtube_description: You survived the grind. 'The Aftermath' provides a beautiful, sweeping Melodic Dubstep and Chillstep atmosphere to bring your heart rate down. Perfect for an extended stretching session as you reflect on a successful morning.

tracks.title: Victory Commute
tracks.listening_scenario: Driving home from the gym feeling accomplished
tracks.style_prompt: Upbeat lo-fi hip hop, 85 bpm, C major, dusty sampled drum breaks, warm jazzy clean guitar licks, smooth upright bass, nostalgic vinyl crackle effects, cheerful positive mood, catchy jazzy guitar hook within first 5 seconds, authentic lo-fi production, instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: View from inside a car driving away from a gym at sunrise, dashboard with a protein shaker, sunny pastel morning sky, lo-fi aesthetic artwork, relaxing vibes, driving to success.
tracks.youtube_description: The hard part is over. 'Victory Commute' is a cheerful, jazzy Lo-Fi Hip Hop track to play as you leave the gym and head into the rest of your day. Ride that endorphin high all the way home.
